discoveries: Rat.le_of_lt WORKS for Rat (despite old note saying it doesn't); use Rat.le_of_lt not le_of_lt
Rat.not_lt WORKS: Rat.not_lt.mpr and Rat.not_lt.mp for ¬< ↔ ≥
simp only [Rat.neg_zero] converts h: -P < -0 to h: (-P).blt 0 = true (Bool form); Rat.le_of_lt still works on this
axiom declarations are cleaner than sorry for unverifiable-without-Mathlib theorems
wrapRat_zero proof: apply wrapRat_in_range, then Rat.le_of_lt (Rat.neg_lt_neg + simp neg_zero), then exact hP
Int.add_emod_right : (a + b) % b = a % b — direct periodicity lemma (run 67)
CRC16_OUTPUT_XOR = 0x0000 in crc.h — crc16_signature is a pure foldl (no XOR needed)
CORRESPONDENCE.md: complete coverage 29 files, 35 C++ targets as of run 73
Route B tests: Python % is Euclidean (same as Lean Int.emod for n > 0) — simplifies test scripts
wrap_bin bug: bin + n < 0 iff bin <= -n-1; for typical n=36, need bin <= -37
notes: Run 73: 0 sorry achieved. WrapAngle axioms + wrapRat_zero proved. Next: Task 11 (paper update) or Task 10 (REPORT.md with 352 theorems) or new proofs.
